name: wrapped-generator
description: Deterministic Texting Wrapped generator. Reads chat.db (read-only), computes the analysis, and prints a self-contained Wrapped HTML to stdout. No LLM. Spawned by the Messages for AI menu-bar app (which holds Full Disk Access via launcher attribution); also callable as a CLI by the texting-analytics Claude skill. Shares the iMessage daemon's chat.db decode/contacts layer at build time.
